creator: netchild@FreeBSD.org
text:
In my builds, I also identified those ports to need PIE_UNSAFE=YES (at least in the past), those which want to switch may want to check them on their own (maybe not build due to dependencies failing which I have fixed in my builds with PIE_UNSAFE=YES):
 - devel/level-zero
 - math/lapack
 - print/tex-xetex
 - shells/zsh
 - x11/nvidia-driver-390 (I use a more recent nvidia port now after changing the card, so not sure if this is still an issue)
